response.step_by_step_log: 1. 00:00-00:34: Intro, birthday title '#ときのそらお披露目誕生日2026', guest intro (Hibiki Riona). 2. 00:35-03:44: Performed '拍動' (Hakudou) by Tokino Sora and Hibiki Riona. Composer credits on screen: '柊マグネタイト', 'Giga'. Found lyrics on UtaTen. 3. 03:45-04:56: Closing banter.
response.global_summary: A video clip of a live birthday performance, featuring Tokino Sora and guest Hibiki Riona performing '拍動' (Hakudou), with intro and closing commentary.

scenes.description: Introduction screen, birthday banner '#ときのそらお披露目誕生日2026', and guest introduction (Hibiki Riona).
Live performance of '拍動' (Hakudou) by Tokino Sora and Hibiki Riona. Song composition credited on-screen to 柊マグネタイト (Hiiragi Magnetite) and Giga.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
僕等よ はじまれ 青く青く 果てまで
蘭の底 目を開けたバースデイ
ホームシックにやられそうなバス停
何処に居たって足りない 命は一つずつ足りない
未だ 羽ばたくのは脳内にて
終わらないで 未だ 不思議な夢を見る
二人なら 何処までも行けると どうしてか 信じたくなる
跳ねる鼓動 誰を呼ぶの ベルの音
座して待てど春夏秋冬 孵化は自分主導
あっという間に終わる祭りを前に 恐れさえも笑い合おう
共に在ろう 至って不完全体 故に面白くなってきた
空腹の夜を越え 空白に願い唱え
諦め尽くされた世界を 君とふたり占めに転げ廻る
混ざり合い、そして生まれ変わるような
きっと僕達だけが成せる パレード
絶対 証明したい 進化したい 才能超えた新形態
さあ 想像次第 「どうなりたい?"
斯くも現実は不可能を敷き詰めたがり
過去の惜別と睨めっこしたって憂うばかり
今はそこに君が居る 未知なるバージョン
覚醒前夜 まだ名も無きヒーロー 行こうか
僕等よ はじまれ 青く青く 果てまで
至って不完全体 故に面白くなってきた
空腹の夜を越え 空白に願い唱え
諦め尽くされた世界を 君とふたり占めに転げ廻る
混ざり合い、そして生まれ変わるような
きっと僕達こそが成せる パレード
不完全体、美しきパレード
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
Let us start, blue, blue, until the end
A birthday where I opened my eyes at the bottom of the orchid
A bus stop that feels like it's getting homesick
No matter where you are, it's not enough, each life is not enough
Still, flapping wings in the brain
Don't end, still, dreaming a strange dream
If it's the two of us, I wonder why, I want to believe we can go anywhere
Beating heart, who are you calling? The sound of a bell
Even if I wait and sit, the four seasons, hatching is my own initiative
Let's laugh together at the fear before the festival that ends in no time
Let's exist together, quite an imperfect body, so it's become interesting
Overcoming the hungry night, singing prayers to the void
Rolling around, taking the world that was given up on for just the two of us
Mixing together, and as if being reborn
Surely it's a parade only we can accomplish
Absolutely, I want to prove it, I want to evolve, a new form beyond talent
Come on, depending on your imagination "What do you want to become?"
Thus, reality likes to fill itself with the impossible
Even if I stare at the farewells of the past, I only feel melancholic
Now you are there, an unknown version
The eve of awakening, still a nameless hero, shall we go?
Let us start, blue, blue, until the end
Quite an imperfect body, so it's become interesting
Overcoming the hungry night, singing prayers to the void
Rolling around, taking the world that was given up on for just the two of us
Mixing together, and as if being reborn
Surely it's a parade only we can accomplish
An imperfect body, a beautiful parade

scenes.description: Closing talk and banter between Tokino Sora and Hibiki Riona.
